node.data: {"M8376":{"lit":"արքայու<abbr>թի<\/abbr>ն","line":{"facs":"#z104234432","resp":"#u2140","break":"no","xml:id":"l104234432","n":"5"},"context":"text/body/ab","page":{"n":"8376-029b"},"n":"արքայութին"},"M6712":{"lit":"արքայու<abbr>թի<\/abbr>ն","line":{"facs":"#z104387332","resp":"#u2140","xml:id":"l104387332","n":"20"},"column":{"n":"2"},"context":"text/body/ab","page":{"n":"6712-128b"},"n":"արքայութին"},"M9307":{"lit":"արք<lb xml:id=\"l104203559\" facs=\"#z104203559\" n=\"2\" resp=\"#u2140\" break=\"no\"/>այու<abbr>թի<\/abbr>ն","line":{"facs":"#z104203558","resp":"#u2140","xml:id":"l104203558","n":"1"},"context":"text/body/ab","page":{"n":"9307-102a"},"n":"արքայութին"},"M7227":{"lit":"արքայ<lb xml:id=\"l103961327\" facs=\"#z103961327\" n=\"3\" resp=\"#u2140\" break=\"no\"/>ու<abbr>թի<\/abbr>ն","line":{"facs":"#z103961326","resp":"#u2140","break":"no","xml:id":"l103961326","n":"2"},"context":"text/body/ab","page":{"n":"7227-032b"},"n":"արքայութին"}}
